assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 7: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — all three values (Role: 'Rust backend service', Serena Instance: 'serena_backend', Path: '/home/user/trustify-backend') match the original exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 8: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — trustify-ui row is present with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 12-16: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747' — all five fields match the original values exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has a '## Preserved (unchanged)' section listing trustify-backend, all Jira fields, Code Intelligence content, and Bug Configuration as preserved; and an '## Added' section explicitly listing trustify-ui entry and serena_ui limitation note as added. Each item uses PRESERVED or ADDED prefixes.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 7-8: '- **serena_backend**: found in MCP tool listing — already present in Repository Registry (trustify-backend). No changes needed.' and '- **serena_ui**: found in MCP tool listing — NOT present in Repository Registry. Newly discovered instance requiring configuration.'

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-33: The naming convention explanation ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name'), the serena_backend example (mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol), and the serena_backend limitation note ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds') are all present unchanged. Only new addition is the serena_ui limitation line ('serena_ui': no known limitations).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing '## Bug Configuration' section with Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), and Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks) unchanged — the skill reports Bug Configuration is up to date
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 36-40: '## Bug Configuration' section contains '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks' — all three values match exactly. changes-log.md also states 'PRESERVED: Bug Configuration — all 3 fields ... retained exactly as-is; reported as up to date'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no '## Security Configuration' section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 19-22: 'User was offered the option to enable Security Triage configuration (Step 9). **Decision**: User declined. Security Configuration section was NOT added to CLAUDE.md.' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section. changes-log.md line 17: 'DECLINED: Security Configuration — user declined opt-in when offered; section was not added to CLAUDE.md'.
